headline: MDB's Atlas Outlook Reflects Caution: Is Growth Losing Momentum?
summary: MongoDB's Atlas growth outlook signals slowing momentum as consumption trends moderate and enterprise spending stays cautious.

headline: ControlMonkey Extends Cloud Configuration Disaster Recovery to Observability Platforms
summary: Platform now supports daily snapshots for leading observability providers – protecting dashboards, alerts, and monitors ControlMonkey Extends Cloud Configuration Disaster Recovery to Observability Platforms ControlMonkey, an Infrastructure Governance and Resilience Platform, today announced the expansion of its Cloud Configuration Disaster Recovery platform to include observability and monitoring platforms. headline: Critical Cloud Becomes the World's First "Powered by Datadog" Partner
summary: Cardiff, United Kingdom--(Newsfile Corp. - March 25, 2026) - Critical Cloud today announced that it has become the world's first partner to achieve the "Powered by Datadog" accreditation, recognising a managed service model built on Datadog as its operational foundation across AWS and Azure environments.Critical Cloud Becomes the World's First "Powered by Datadog" PartnerTo view an enhanced version of this graphic, please...
